Quote:
(Must Equip, Casting Time: 8.0)
▲ Page top
Worth it's weight in gold
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2005 at 11:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759184491
10 posts
Just to inject some sanity into this thread:

1) You can still use it to trigger OT hammer. They made a change so that if you kill the eye, you can't recast until it poofs. Fix? Loot the dead eye. Simple

2) This is probably the single greatest and most indispensible pulling tool in the bards inventory. It is utterly essential gear, and as such worth every pp. Think big crowded rooms, think sending in the eye and lulling the lot. Its the biz.

So yeah worth 50k.

▲ Page top
cant attack the eye anymore
QuoteReply
# May 27 2005 at 10:05 AM Rating: Decent

4 posts
Used to be able to use the eye and the OT hammer and get a free ride to the shipyard in OT but can't attack the eye anymore.

▲ Page top
NERF
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2002 at 9:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756981367
48 posts
It must have been nerfed since the Holgresh Elder Beads have been nerfed because Eye of Zomm is exploited by PvP necros..
▲ Page top
RE: NERF
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2003 at 2:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774623301
63 posts
I realize this post is nearly a year old, but just for anyone who should be reading...

The Holgresh Elder Beads were not "nerfed," they simply stopped dropping. The impetus of this change was that they were abused as a pulling tool. With the change to the way pets draw aggro, the Beads no longer can be used in that way, nor can these.

Eye of Zomm's original intent, and its primary use these days, is as a scouting tool. This is especially useful in LDoN, where you never know just how many bad guys are on the other side of the door...
▲ Page top
RE: NERF
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2003 at 10:23 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1702858585426
Scholar
633 posts
If the eye once upon a time could draw agro, and it no longer can,isn't that a "nerf"?
▲ Page top
RE: NERF
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2004 at 4:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260213100
View User Forum
18 posts
Eye of Zomm's a spell, so maybe they nerfed that - but they never nerfed the item.
▲ Page top
All Kunarks have Bad Procs
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 9:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759849256
2 posts
It's not such a bad proc, the other kunark sets have even worse procs....Ranger legs are CANCEL magic a low lvl dispell, cobalt bp is INVIGOR = ranger boots and bard arms, so don't think eye of zomm is so bad till you check the other kunark armor procs.
▲ Page top
RE: All Kunarks have Bad Procs
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 2:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763982539
23 posts
Cobalt Breastplate is Invigorate, not invigor. Invigor(increase stamina regen for a short period of time, kinda like celestial healing, except with stamina) Invigorate(around 90 hitpoint heal). Invigorate is not on Ranger boots or Bard arms. Invigorate are on all kunark and quest BPs, and(i think) PoG, and(not sure about this one) PoH.

Cancel magic is more useful than Eye of Zomm on most occasions, due to dispelling things like SOW and dmg shield on mobs. eye of zomm is merely a scout, and will most likely be attacked, and then trained back to you.
▲ Page top
RE: All Kunarks have Bad Procs
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2004 at 5:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263292977
31 posts
its a 100 point heal and no its not nearly on every kunark bp ahahahah.
▲ Page top
RE: All Kunarks have Bad Procs
QuoteReply
# May 23 2003 at 5:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257127264
39 posts
the eye is sort of a gm-type scout... no faction. nothing attacks it, but you can't attack anything thru it. it's very handy as a scout, mostly because it won't get aggroed (sometimes I THINK my rogues invised... only to get a nasty surprise
▲ Page top
Please eye - please please please
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2001 at 11:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757052268
13 posts
I just got this last night and was able to answer a question I have wanted to know. You can beg from this Eye. This means I can raise my begging skill when I am otherwise sitting idle like on the boat or auctioning in EC.

Why raise Beg? Beg is a major taunt when you are trying to pull a mob off a caster.

Tinkle LilBelle
Bard for www.brambledmoon.com
▲ Page top
RE: Please eye - please please please
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2002 at 2:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361824616
35 posts
In response to begging being a major taunt. My bard has a 179 in begging and no, the taunt is not that great. Not to mention, you must stop melee before you can taunt which just means more finger play and less dmg (and bards don't need anymore buttons.. we got enough trying to just twist songs all the time). So why do I beg? Why not? We sit back with the casters waiting for pulls so it gives me something to do during downtime. Another factor to bring to light... The higher your begging skill, the less of a taunt factor it is =p .
▲ Page top
RE: Please eye - please please please
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2004 at 10:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591796375031
38 posts
Just curious but why would a bard be waiting with casters for pulls and not pulling? *shrug* that's what we're best at. Also, this helm is useful as you can summon the eyes to proc the Worker Sledgemallet on (overthere gate hammer).
▲ Page top
RE: Please eye - please please please
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2004 at 5:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256296385
Scholar
27 posts
Read the date of the first post.. bards were ALOT different 2 years ago.. this was an accepted role in groups then. Not alot of point reviving this, and if you'd just READ the date in the first place you probably wouldn't have wasted your time..

It has its uses
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2001 at 10:22 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Actually Eye of Zomm can be quite useful.
With it you can:
Single Pull Phinny in KK
And we use it alot when pulling in ToV. In the HoT section it works pretty well if its just a few people, and not a full raid. So dont count out everything that seems worthless, it can all be used benifcially for something

▲ Page top
eye of zomm
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2001 at 3:15 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ask any necro how "useless" a eye of zomm is during downtime. Lich from full health/zero mana, up to 1 bubble life and 4 bubbles mana, then BoD the eye, that will totally heal the necro(even in lich) and the mana used to cast BoD will regain back while BoD is working...useless effect BAH!
▲ Page top
RE: eye of zomm

Demi Lich Skullcap
http://lucy.allakhazam.com/item.html?id=48043

MAGIC ITEM LORE ITEM NO TRADE
Slot: HEAD
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 10
DEX: +10 STA: +10 CHA: -5 INT: +15 HP: +50 MANA: +75
SV MAGIC: +10
Effect: Morternum (Must Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 50
WT: 0.6 Size: SMALL
Class: NEC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Morternum
http://lucy.allakhazam.com/spell.html?id=5222&source=Live

Slot Description
3: Decrease Hitpoints by 122 per tick


Mana: 495 Casting Time: 5.5
Recast Time: 2.25 Fizzle Time: 2.5
Resist: Magic Resist Adjust: -200
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Category: NPC
Source: Live 06/28


Classes: None
Duration: 1 ticks @L1 to 9 ticks @L15
Autocast: Morternum Recourse
Items with spell: Demi Lich Skullcap


Cast on you: A dark spirit tears at your body.
Cast on other: Someone is torn apart by a dark spirit.
Wears off: The dark spirit drifts away.

#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 9:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) yes the ac is good yet Verant in the infinite wisdom yet again SCREWS over Bards by giving us CRAPPY Effects.... PLEASE Verant Give us Bards something DECENT .. ill settle for less armor class but some kinda stat or function that isnt a low lvl spell from another caster....
#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 4:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) LOL not only is it a crappy proc, but it's the lower level Zomm spell which lasts for about 30 seconds and anything that aggroes on the eye bound to be close enough to aggroe on you. What a useless proc!
